textByHash.bfe3aaec9ec05cf6a41a096448faf599fcf69c8d: Thank you, kind sir... now I am free from my imprisonment.
textByHash.cc5e719c893ebdd0909aab074c6676f1b058f10c: Thank you, kind lady... now I am free from my imprisonment.
textByHash.2a110ca332deb60e18b516b2b709f2f06a2cd598: I no longer need these bones - take them, please, and bury what you can.
